title: El and L's Interiors Resource Pack
description: A resource pack that adds compatibility between El and L's Dye Mod and Create: Interiors.
body:
This resource pack brings compatibility between **[Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors)** and **[El and L's Dye Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/el-and-ls-dye-mod)** by adding custom models and textures for chairs in all 20 new dye colors. Now, you can use the seats that perfectly match the expanded color palette!

![All new chairs colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e34440d721ba1fb4d5869940c9f9d09ccf2d43af.png)

For the best experience, I highly recommend using this alongside my data pack, which adds crafting recipes and loot tables for the newly colored chairs—allowing you to obtain and use them in survival mode.

[Download the data pack here!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/el-and-ls-interiors-data-pack)

This resource pack is based on assets from [Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors) and [El and L's Dye Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/el-and-ls-dye-mod).
